title: The Leonardo Collection Jennifer Rose Gallery Mum Hand & Lip Care Set | Hand Cream for Very Dry Hands & Moisturising Lip Balm | Non-Greasy Fast-Absorbing Hydrating Lip | Hand Moisturiser for Soft Skin
features: Deep Hydration for Hands – Luxurious hand cream for very dry hands with cherry blossom & vanilla, deeply hydrates & restores skin. A perfect hand cream for women, non-greasy & fast-absorbing for daily use.

Long-Lasting Moisture Protection – Rich hand moisturiser similar to CeraVe moisturising cream & Aveeno moisturising cream, instantly boosts moisture, creates a protective layer & prevents moisture loss.

Nourishing Lip Balm Set – Multipurpose lip balm set with a moisturising lip balm that deeply hydrates dry, chapped lips. Infused with Vitamin E, this best lipbalm provides all-day moisture & protection.
Soothing Relief for Dry Skin – Hand cream for dry cracked hands with a formula like working hands cream, soothes sensitive skin while delivering long-lasting hydration & protection against dryness.

Glossy & Hydrating Lip Care – Lip care gift set featuring a glossy lip balm for a sheer tint of color & a hydrating lipbalm repair formula. This cruelty-free beauty essential protects dry, cracked lips.
description: Product Description The Leonardo Collection Jennifer Rose Gallery Mum Hand & Lip Care Set | Hand Cream for Very Dry Hands & Moisturising Lip Balm | Non-Greasy Fast-Absorbing Hydrating Lip | Hand Moisturiser for Soft Skin Safety Warning For external use only; patch test before use; discontinue if irritation occurs; keep out of reach of children; avoid ingestion; store in a cool, dry place; do not use on broken skin; use within expiry date; avoid sharing; flammable if applicable.
